description: Full selective pallet racking system installation, 3 aisles, 24 bays, double deep configuration. Includes uprights, beams, wire decking, and row spacers.
workers: Dave Kowalski, Tyler Brooks, Emilio Santos
notes: Client wants job completed before their peak season in April. Site access Mon-Sat 6am-5pm.

address: 1100 Port of Tacoma Rd, Tacoma, WA 98421
description: Full sortation conveyor system, 180 linear feet, belt and roller sections, 3 merge points, barcode scanners at induction stations.
notes: Awaiting client sign-off on revised quote. Sent v3 on 3/4/2026.

description: 2,400 sq ft structural steel mezzanine, staircase with handrail, pallet gate, 4-post design. Rated 125 psf live load.
workers: Dave Kowalski, Emilio Santos, Ray Tran
notes: Passed city inspection 12/18/2025. Client signed completion form. Invoice outstanding.

description: 5-ton overhead bridge crane installation, 60ft span, pendant controls, end trucks, runway beams with column supports. Includes load testing and certification.
workers: Dave Kowalski, Tyler Brooks, Maria Gonzalez
subcontractors: NW Electrical Contractors, Crane Certified WA
notes: Load test passed 1/8/2026. Certificate of compliance issued. Invoice sent 1/15/2026.

address: 2305 Olympic Hwy N, Port Angeles, WA 98362
description: 4 dock leveler replacements (hydraulic), 4 dock seals, 2 pit-style vehicle restraints. Full removal and disposal of existing equipment.
notes: Steel dock plates on backorder until 3/20. Client aware and OK with delay.

description: Two-room modular office complex inside warehouse, 20x30 ft, drop ceiling, LED lighting, 2 AC units, electrical panel hookup, glass window inserts.
notes: Client comparing 2 other bids. Follow up week of 3/17.

description: OSHA-compliant safety railing around 3 mezzanine perimeters, 2 swing gates, 1 removable offset gate, powder coated safety yellow.
notes: Completed 2/3/2026. Client very happy. Referred us to their sister facility in Renton.

description: Class 1 wire security cage, 20x30 ft, 10ft height, keyed deadbolt entry, pallet racking inside cage included in scope.
notes: Compliance requirement — must be completed before state inspection on 4/1/2026.

description: 2 high-speed roll-up door installations (interior), 1 sectional insulated overhead door (exterior), electric operators with safety sensors.
notes: Doors installed 2/7/2026. Electric operators commissioned 2/10. Final walkthrough complete.

description: Full tenant improvement buildout: 12,000 sq ft warehouse partition, 8 office spaces, 2 conference rooms, full electrical and HVAC, dock equipment, and mezzanine storage.

notes: Largest active job. Weekly progress meetings Fridays at 9am. City permit approved 2/18/2026. Phase 1 complete.
